reviews.comment:
Un único empleado haciendo el trabajo de 3, con muy buena onda eso si, pero totalmente sobrepasado. Tampoco  reciben la app yof, recargo con tarheta de crédito. Todos los síntomas de tratar de ganar más sin poner un peso en el negocio

(Translated by Google)
One employee doing the work of three, very friendly though, but completely overwhelmed. They don't accept the Yof app either; I have to pay with a credit card. All the signs of trying to make more money without investing a penny in the business.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16439864451681857894/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNCbE9paHBBRRAB
